_meta: Route map for the Falcone control-plane HTTP server. Maps every backend op the web-console (apps/web-console) invokes to the implementing product code + invoke contract + deps + auth. invoke values: 'callercontext-overrides' = main(params,overrides) reading params.callerContext.actor and overrides.db (server builds callerContext from trusted gateway headers x-auth-subject/x-tenant-id/x-actor-type); 'owhttp-overrides' = main(params,overrides) reading identity from params.__ow_headers (x-tenant-id/x-workspace-id/x-actor-roles) and overrides.db; 'params-auth' = main(params) reading params.auth {roles,tenantId,...} + params.db; 'params-auth-overrides' = main(params,overrides) reading params.auth + overrides.db; 'owhttp-jwks' = main(params) self-verifies Bearer JWT vs JWKS, own pg client via setClient; 'params-pg' = handler(params) with pg at params.pg, internal method/path sub-routing; 'facade' = saga/workflow facade; 'NONE' = no executable handler exists (real gap). Console paths that DIFFER from services/internal-contracts/src/public-route-catalog.json are noted: the console + the existing test-env (tests/env/action-runner/routes.mjs) target a plan/quota/tenant API surface (/v1/plans, /v1/quota-dimensions, /v1/tenant/plan/*, /v1/admin/tenants) that is NOT in the canonical catalog; the catalog uses createTenant@/v1/tenants and createCommercialPlan@/v1/platform/plans instead. Reference impl of the shim: tests/env/action-runner/server.mjs + routes.mjs.

notes: console-auth.ts::fetchConsoleSignupPolicy. No server impl: apps/control-plane/src/console-auth.mjs only exposes route-catalog metadata helpers (listConsoleAuthRoutes/summarizeConsoleAuthSurface), no handler. Requires Keycloak to produce a real policy. GAP.
console-auth.ts::startConsoleLoginSession (LoginPage). No server impl; must perform Keycloak ROPC/token exchange against realm in-falcone-platform, client in-falcone-console. GAP - needs Keycloak.
console-session.ts auto-refresh + console-auth.ts::refreshConsoleLoginSession. GAP - Keycloak token refresh.
console-auth.ts::terminateConsoleLoginSession (logout). GAP.
console-auth.ts::submitConsoleSignup (SignupPage). GAP - Keycloak user registration.
console-auth.ts::fetchConsoleAccountStatusView (PendingActivationPage/LoginPage). Public static ConsoleAccountStatusView handler for canonical auth edge-state copy; no Keycloak or DB dependency.
Referenced in tests; SPA reads session from sessionStorage, but /v1/console/session is the canonical hydration endpoint. NOT in catalog. GAP.

Console uses /v1/tenants (list), /v1/admin/tenants (create), /v1/tenants/{id}/workspaces (list+create workspace). Catalog has createTenant@POST /v1/tenants and listTenants@GET /v1/tenants but NO /v1/admin/tenants. No provisioning-orchestrator action implements tenant CRUD.

console-context.tsx::fetchTenants (ConsoleTenantsPage). apps/control-plane/src/tenant-management.mjs has ONLY metadata/preview helpers (previewTenantInventory, summarizeTenantManagementSurface) - no list handler, no DB read. GAP: needs a tenants table reader.

CreateTenantWizard.tsx -> submitWizardRequest('/v1/admin/tenants', {name,planId,region,preferences}). Maps to facade WF-CON-002 (console-backend-functions.mjs CONSOLE_WORKFLOW_ROUTE_CLASSIFICATIONS, representativeOperationId createTenant) which runs a saga (apps/control-plane/src/saga). No standalone main() action; provisioning is a multi-step saga needing tenant table + Keycloak realm + Kafka. Catalog createTenant is at /v1/tenants not /v1/admin/tenants. GAP for a single-process server (saga + Keycloak).
WF-CON-002 statusOperationId. queryWorkflowStatus(sagaId, callerContext) -> saga/index.mjs getSagaStatus. Console polls after createTenant.
Catalog getTenant. No handler in tenant-management.mjs. GAP.

auth: superadmin/internal any tenant; tenant_owner own only (403 on cross-tenant)
notes: planManagementApi.ts::getEffectiveCapabilities(tenantId). Also tenant-scoped variant /v1/tenant/effective-capabilities. Reads plans/tenant_plan_assignments (097), boolean_capability_catalog (104).
planManagementApi.ts::getEffectiveCapabilities() with no tenantId -> resolves actor.tenantId. Same action as above.

Plan/quota family is the BEST-implemented domain: provisioning-orchestrator actions all main(params,overrides), callerContext + overrides.db (+ optional overrides.producer Kafka, no-op when absent). Console paths /v1/plans, /v1/quota-dimensions, /v1/tenant/plan/* are NOT in the catalog. Schema: migrations 097,098,100,103,104,105.
planManagementApi.ts::listPlans. mergeQueryIntoParams (page,pageSize,status). Reads plans table (097). Already wired in tests/env routes.mjs.

planManagementApi.ts::createPlan. mergeBodyIntoParams (slug,displayName,capabilities,quotaDimensions). Returns 201. overrides.producer optional (emitPlanEvent no-ops without it). Validates capability keys vs boolean_capability_catalog (104). Already in tests/env routes.mjs.
planManagementApi.ts::getPlan. Path param planIdOrSlug. Detects pln_/uuid vs slug. 404 PLAN_NOT_FOUND.
planManagementApi.ts::updatePlan. mergeBody + planId path param.

planManagementApi.ts::deletePlan. Hard-deletes never-assigned plans only; active or historical assignments return PLAN_HAS_ASSIGNMENT_HISTORY and operators must use the lifecycle archive path to retire the plan.
planManagementApi.ts::transitionPlanLifecycle (draft->active->deprecated->archived). mergeBody + planId.
planManagementApi.ts::getPlanLimitsProfile. Reads plan base limits (098).
planManagementApi.ts::setPlanLimit. planId + dimensionKey path params; body {value}.
planManagementApi.ts::removePlanLimit.

planManagementApi.ts::assignPlan. tenantId path param + body. Writes tenant_plan_assignments, effective_entitlements; emits plan + change-impact events; records metrics (overrides.metricRecorder optional). Reads/writes 097,100,105.
planManagementApi.ts::getTenantCurrentPlan. Also self variant /v1/tenant/plan (getMyPlan) resolves actor.tenantId.
planManagementApi.ts::getMyPlan (ConsoleTenantPlanPage). Same action, no tenantId.
planManagementApi.ts::getTenantPlanHistory. page/pageSize query.

planManagementApi.ts::getTenantPlanHistoryImpact. Reads tenant_plan_change_history (100). Same action also exposed in tests/env at /v1/plans/change-history. Query: tenantId,page,pageSize,actorId,from,to.
planManagementApi.ts::getMyPlanLimits (requireTenantOwner). Returns {tenantId,noAssignment,profile}.

planManagementApi.ts::getEffectiveEntitlements() no tenantId. Note tests/env wires the SAME action at /v1/tenant/entitlements; the console uses /v1/tenant/plan/effective-entitlements. Reads 097,098,103,104. include=consumption switches to resolveTenantConsumption.
planManagementApi.ts::getEffectiveEntitlements(tenantId). Same action; cross-tenant IDOR guard (403).
Plan-level effective entitlements preview. Present in actions; not yet confirmed in a console lib path but available for plan detail. consoleUsed best-effort false.

planManagementApi.ts::getConsumption() (ConsoleTenantPlanOverviewPage). Admin variant /v1/tenants/{tenantId}/plan/consumption. tenant-effective-entitlements-get also serves consumption via include=consumption.
planManagementApi.ts::getConsumption(tenantId).
planManagementApi.ts::getAllocationSummary() (ConsoleTenantAllocationSummaryPage). Aggregates workspace_sub_quotas (105) per dimension. Admin variant /v1/tenants/{tenantId}/plan/allocation-summary.
planManagementApi.ts::getAllocationSummary(tenantId).
planManagementApi.ts::getWorkspaceConsumption(workspaceId). Self route used by /console/workspaces/{workspaceId}; tenantId is resolved from trusted callerContext.actor.tenantId.
planManagementApi.ts::getWorkspaceConsumption(workspaceId, tenantId). Explicit tenant route; superadmin/internal may target any tenant and tenant-scoped callers may target only their own tenant.
Workspace effective limits resolver (105). Available; used by quota panels.
planManagementApi.ts::listQuotaDimensions (ConsolePlanCreatePage / quotas). Reads quota_dimension_catalog (098). Already in tests/env routes.mjs.

auth: any authenticated; tenant_owner own only (strips overrideMetadata)
notes: Resolves effective limits per tenant (overrides applied, 103). Console quota posture is served by metrics family (getTenantQuotaPosture) but this is the canonical effective-limit reader.
ConsoleQuotasPage override create. Writes quota_overrides (103). hard/soft + graceMargin + justification + expiry validation.
ConsoleQuotasPage override list.
Quota override modify.
Quota override revoke.
Quota audit trail.

auth: superadmin/internal; tenant_owner own tenant; workspace_admin own ws
notes: ConsoleQuotasPage sub-quota allocation. mergeBody {tenantId,workspaceId,dimensionKey,allocatedValue}. 422 if exceeds tenant effective limit. Writes workspace_sub_quotas (105). Already in tests/env routes.mjs.
mergeQuery {tenantId,workspaceId,dimensionKey,limit,offset}. Already in tests/env routes.mjs.
Sub-quota removal.

family: METRICS / QUOTA USAGE (console quota posture + observability)
notes: Console quota posture (ConsoleQuotasPage, wizards) + observability dashboards use the metrics family, which IS in the catalog. BUT apps/control-plane/src/observability-admin.mjs + observability-audit-* are metadata/preview/normalization helpers with NO executable {statusCode,body} DB handler. apps/web-console/src/actions/observability-*.mjs are SPA-side transforms, not handlers. So metrics endpoints are GAPS unless a usage-snapshot reader is built. tenant-consumption-snapshot-get / quota-effective-limits-get from the plans family can back the posture.

console-quotas.ts::useConsoleQuotas + console-metrics.ts. No handler (observability-admin.mjs has buildUsageDimensionSnapshot helpers only). GAP - back with quota-effective-limits-get + usage snapshot.
console-quotas.ts + console-metrics.ts. GAP.
console-metrics.ts. GAP. tenant-consumption-snapshot-get can supply data.
console-quotas.ts/console-metrics.ts workspace posture. GAP.
console-quotas.ts. GAP.
console-metrics.ts series chart. GAP.
console-metrics.ts audit list. queryTenantAuditRecords(context,params) returns a normalized QUERY spec, not a DB result - needs a repo to execute it. PARTIAL/GAP.
console-metrics.ts::requestAuditExport. Module builds an export manifest + masking preview, no executor/storage write. PARTIAL/GAP (needs object store).

IAM realm/user/role/client/scope CRUD (catalog family iam, /v1/iam/realms/*) has NO executable handler: apps/control-plane/src/iam-admin.mjs + iam-governance.mjs are metadata/contract/preview helpers (keycloak refs are version-compat metadata only). They need a live Keycloak admin client. ONLY tenant CUSTOM roles (iam-tenant-roles.mjs) and privilege-domains/scope-enforcement (provisioning-orchestrator) are real handlers (Postgres).
ConsoleMembersPage.tsx + ConsoleAuthPage.tsx. iam-admin.mjs has no list handler; requires Keycloak Admin API. GAP.
ConsoleMembersPage/ConsoleAuthPage. GAP - Keycloak.
ConsoleAuthPage. GAP - Keycloak.
ConsoleAuthPage. GAP - Keycloak.
CreateIamClientWizard.tsx -> submitWizardRequest('/v1/workspaces/{ws}/iam/clients'). external-application-iam.mjs has only metadata helpers. GAP - Keycloak client creation.

auth: tenant scope (identity from x-tenant-id header; 401 if absent)
notes: Real handler. fn(params,overrides): db=overrides.db??params.db, identity from parseTenantRoleIdentity(params.__ow_headers). Reads tenant_custom_roles (migration 120). Returns {statusCode,body}.
Real handler. Validates role_name/allowed_actions vs reachable actions for roles. Writes tenant_custom_roles (120).
Real handler. roleId path param.
Real handler. overrides.triggerRecalculate optional (recalc effective permissions).
Real handler (soft delete).

auth: platform_admin OR structural_admin in own tenant/workspace
notes: privilege-domain-api.ts uses /api/* prefix (NOT /v1). main(params,overrides): reads params.auth {roles,tenantId,privilegeDomains}, overrides.db. Last-admin guard. overrides.syncKeycloakRoles + invalidateApisixCache + publishEvent are optional no-ops. Writes privilege_domain_assignments.
ConsolePrivilegeDomainPage. main(params,overrides), overrides.db.
ConsolePrivilegeDomainAuditPage. overrides.db.
ConsoleScopeEnforcementPage. main(params,overrides), overrides.db.

Workspace list/get/create has NO executable handler: workspace-management.mjs is metadata only (summarize/clone-draft/inheritance). Create is the WF-CON-003 saga facade. Capability catalog + docs + realtime have backing actions.
console-context.tsx::fetchWorkspaces. No workspace list reader. GAP.
CreateWorkspaceWizard name validation (useAsyncNameValidator) + tenant detail. GAP.

CreateWorkspaceWizard.tsx -> submitWizardRequest('/v1/tenants/{tenantId}/workspaces',{name,description,initialLimits}). Facade WF-CON-003 (representativeOperationId createWorkspace) runs executeSaga. Catalog createWorkspace is at /v1/workspaces. Saga-backed - PARTIAL (needs saga + Keycloak realm).
WF-CON-003 statusOperationId. getSagaStatus.

auth: workspace member (NOTE: console calls this via raw fetch() WITHOUT Bearer)
notes: ConsoleCapabilityCatalogPage.tsx uses plain fetch (no auth header) - likely a public/discovery surface. Action exports createWorkspaceCapabilityCatalog (builder), not a main() handler. capability-catalog-list.mjs (main, callercontext-overrides, superadmin) is the catalog-wide variant.
Catalog-wide capability list. Reads boolean_capability_catalog (104).
console-workspace-docs.ts (ConsoleWorkspaceDashboardPage). Backed by services/workspace-docs-service (has migrations). Note: console-workspace-docs uses requestJson (NO Bearer) - check auth wiring.
console-workspace-docs.ts::createWorkspaceDocNote. Also PUT/DELETE /v1/workspaces/{ws}/docs/notes/{noteId}.

auth: authenticated; tenant_owner/tenant_admin or workspace_owner/workspace_admin for body.workspaceId
notes: InviteUserWizard.tsx -> submitWizardRequest('/v1/tenants/{tenantId}/invitations') with body.workspaceId/email/role/message. Local handler persists tenant_invitations with masked email/hash and returns MutationAccepted.

auth: authenticated; tenant scope verified against workspace owner
notes: ConsoleRealtimePage. Returns {workspaceId,realtimeEndpointUrl,features:{realtime},dataSources:[{type,...}]} from realtime_channels rows owned by the verified tenant. Owned workspace with no rows returns 200 empty config instead of 404 NO_ROUTE.
ConsoleAuthPage external applications section. Resolves workspace first, hides foreign workspaces as 404, and returns a real collection (possibly empty) instead of 404 NO_ROUTE.

auth: authenticated; tenant_owner/admin of workspace tenant or platform
notes: ConsoleAuthPage create external application. Persists the canonical JSONB document and returns 202 or structured 400 VALIDATION_ERROR, not NO_ROUTE.
Lists starter templates from apps/control-plane external-application IAM helper after workspace scope verification.
Reads one persisted external application after workspace scope verification.

auth: authenticated; tenant_owner/admin of workspace tenant or platform
notes: Updates or soft-deletes one persisted external application with structured validation errors.
Lists embedded federated providers for one persisted external application.

auth: authenticated; tenant_owner/admin of workspace tenant or platform
notes: Adds one embedded federated provider to an external application with structured validation errors.
Reads one embedded federated provider after workspace and application scope verification.

auth: authenticated; tenant_owner/admin of workspace tenant or platform
notes: Updates one embedded federated provider and rejects providerId changes.
ProvisionDatabaseWizard.tsx -> submitWizardRequest('/v1/workspaces/{ws}/databases'). No provisioning action; needs to create a real PG db or Mongo db. GAP.
PublishFunctionWizard.tsx -> submitWizardRequest('/v1/workspaces/{ws}/functions'). functions-admin.mjs is metadata only; real function deploy needs OpenWhisk. GAP.
Service-account + credential ops are facade WF-CON-004/006 (saga). No standalone action; credential issuance needs Keycloak. console-service-accounts.ts drives all of these.
console-service-accounts.ts::createServiceAccount. Facade WF-CON-006. Returns MutationAccepted (202). Saga + Keycloak. PARTIAL/GAP.
console-service-accounts.ts::useConsoleServiceAccounts. Backend collection source of truth for the Service Accounts page; returns workspace service accounts independent of browser sessionStorage.
Direct service-account detail reader; the console list page uses listServiceAccounts as its collection source.
console-service-accounts.ts::issueCredential. Facade WF-CON-004. Keycloak. GAP.
console-service-accounts.ts::rotateCredential. Facade WF-CON-004. GAP.
console-service-accounts.ts::revokeCredential. Facade WF-CON-004. GAP.

Secret rotation actions exist (provisioning-orchestrator) but use a DISTINCT invoke shape: main(params) reading params.auth {roles,tenantId} + params.db + params.vaultClient/publishEvent/triggerEsoRefresh via resolveDependencies. Error shape is {error:{code,status}} not always {statusCode,body}. Console secretRotationActions.ts uses raw fetch (NO Bearer). Needs Vault.

auth: superadmin OR platform-operator(domain in platform/gateway/iam/functions) OR tenant-owner(domain=tenant,own)
notes: secretRotationActions.ts::rotateSecret. main(params): db=params.db, vaultClient=params.vaultClient (default stub), publishEvent/triggerEsoRefresh. Binds secretPath to caller tenant (cross-tenant guard). Returns {error:{code,status}} on failure. NEEDS Vault for real writes.
secretRotationActions.ts::revokeVersion. resolveDependencies(params).
secretRotationActions.ts::fetchConsumerStatus.
secretRotationActions.ts::fetchHistory. secretInventory(params,{query}) - second arg is a {query} deps object (pg query fn).

family: TENANT CONFIG (export / preflight / reprovision / validate / migrate)
notes: Real handlers in provisioning-orchestrator, main(params,overrides). Auth is SCOPE-based: identity + scope (e.g. platform:admin:config:export) from __ow_headers x-actor-scopes. Console api/config*Api.ts + actions/tenant-management.mjs use raw fetch (Bearer added by caller). Schema 114,115,117,118.
configSchemaApi.ts::getFormatVersions. Pure GET, no DB. Already in tests/env routes.mjs (params-only).
configExportApi.ts::getExportDomains. Note path uses /v1/admin/tenants (NOT catalog).
configExportApi.ts::exportConfig. main(params,overrides), overrides.db. Reads functional config (115). Catalog has exportTenantConfiguration at /v1/tenants/{tenantId}/exports.
configPreflightApi.ts::runPreflight. overrides.db. Schema 118.
configReprovisionApi.ts::reprovision. overrides.db. Schema 117.
configReprovisionApi.ts::buildIdentifierMap. overrides.db.
configSchemaApi.ts::validateArtifact. No DB (pure validation).
configSchemaApi.ts::migrateArtifact. No DB.
Backup status uses backup-status service with IN-ACTION JWKS auth (owhttp-jwks, distinct model). Backup scope matrix uses provisioning-orchestrator actions (callercontext). Schema 114.

auth: in-action JWKS Bearer JWT verify; tenant_id+scopes from token; read:own vs read:global
notes: backupStatusApi.ts (BackupStatusPage). Self-authenticating: verifies Bearer vs KEYCLOAK_JWKS_URL, own pg client primed via repository.js setClient(pool). 405 unless __ow_method=='get'. Already in tests/env routes.mjs (params-owhttp + setClientModule).
backupScopeApi.ts::fetchBackupScopeMatrix. Reads deployment profiles (114).
backupScopeApi.ts::fetchTenantBackupScope (BackupSummaryPage).

ConsoleOperationsPage polls a single POST query endpoint. Console path /v1/async-operation-query (one POST, queryType in body). tests/env exposes the SAME action as REST GET /v1/async-operations[/{id}]. Both backed by async-operation-query.mjs main(params,overrides).
console-operations.ts::fetchAsyncOperationQuery. POST with body {queryType,operationId,filters,pagination}. mergeBody. tests/env uses REST GET variants instead but same module.

Per the brief, only representative read endpoints listed. ALL data-plane *-admin / *-data-api control-plane modules are metadata/contract helpers with NO executable handler (handlerish:0). These families need live PG/Mongo/MinIO data sources + downstream adapters; they are GAPS for a control-plane-only server. Realtime captures DO have real provisioning-orchestrator/actions/realtime handlers (owhttp-overrides, deps.db).
ConsolePostgresPage (114 routes in family). postgres-admin.mjs/postgres-data-api.mjs metadata only. Needs live per-tenant PG introspection. GAP (representative of the whole postgres family).
ConsoleMongoPage (49 routes). mongo-admin.mjs/mongo-data-api.mjs metadata only. Needs live Mongo. GAP (representative).
ConsoleStoragePage (25 routes). storage-admin.mjs metadata only. Needs MinIO/S3. GAP (representative).
ConsoleFunctionsPage (55 routes). functions-admin.mjs metadata only; real activations need OpenWhisk. This is the CONSOLE_BACKEND_WORKFLOW_ROUTE_ID. GAP (representative).
ConsoleKafkaPage (10 routes + captures). events-admin.mjs metadata only; needs live Kafka. GAP (representative). Topic stream uses raw fetch (SSE).

auth: authenticated; tenant scope verified against workspace owner
notes: EventsConsole data page. Lists workspace_topics rows for the owned workspace and returns {items:[{topic,partitions,resourceId,topicName}]} instead of 404 NO_ROUTE.

auth: tenant owner/admin of workspace tenant or platform
notes: EventsConsole create-topic request sends body.name. Handler provisions the managed Kafka topic and returns 201; old {topic} console body caused 400 VALIDATION_ERROR.

auth: tenant owner/admin of workspace tenant or platform
notes: EventsConsole publish. Resolves the owned workspace and logical topic row, normalizes body {key,value} to Kafka payload semantics, and returns 202 instead of 404 NO_ROUTE.

auth: authenticated; tenant scope verified against workspace owner
notes: EventsConsole message poll. Resolves the owned workspace and logical topic row, consumes a bounded Kafka batch, and returns {items:[{key,value,partition,offset,timestamp}]} instead of 404 NO_ROUTE.
Real handler. main(params,{db}). Enable/disable/tenant-summary siblings also real (pg-capture-enable/disable/tenant-summary). Same pattern for mongo-captures.
scheduling-engine is a full real handler with internal method/path sub-routing. Already in tests/env routes.mjs.

subroutes: internal sub-routing by params.method + params.path (jobs, jobs/{id}, jobs/{id}/pause, config, summary)
notes: handler(params) with pg at params.pg. Reads params.query/params.body (NOT flattened). Matches /v1/scheduling(/.*)? - one route handles the whole family. Already in tests/env routes.mjs.
